title: Fishing device
abstract: Disclosed is a remotely operable fishing device comprising a body configured in use for movement in water. The body may have an interior cavity configured to receive and retain at least a portion of a fishing tackle. The device may be adapted 5 to dispense the fishing tackle from the body. Also disclosed is the fishing device that may comprise a guidance system that may be housed in the body. A target navigational bearing of the device may be set on shore. The direction of the movement of the device through the water may be guided by the measured bearings of the guidance system. A propulsion system for the device can be 10 powered by a battery. The battery can be located in a position which determines the centre of gravity of the device.
claims:
Claims A remotely operable fishing device comprising: a body configured in use for movement in water, the body having an interior cavity configured to receive and retain at least a portion of a fishing tackle, the device being adapted to dispense the fishing tackle from the body. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 1 , wherein the device further comprises a storage unit locatable at least partially within the interior cavity of the body and adapted to store the fishing tackle. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 2, wherein the storage unit is moveable between a retaining configuration and a releasing configuration, the releasing configuration being adapted to dispense the fishing tackle. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 2 or 3, wherein the storage unit comprises a cartridge. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of claims 2 to 4, wherein the storage unit pivots to dispense the fishing tackle. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of the preceding claims, the body further comprising a hatch for covering an opening of the interior cavity. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 6, wherein the hatch is movable between a closed position and an open position, wherein movement of the hatch from the closed position into the open position effects dispensing of the fishing tackle. 8. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 7, wherein the hatch moves to the open position in response to an operator command. 9. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 8, wherein the operator command comprises setting the hatch to open automatically after a predetermined time. 10. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the fishing tackle comprises at least one baited hook engaged with at least one line. 11. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 10, wherein the device comprises multiple separate compartments for storing portions of the tackle separated from one another. 12. A remotely operable fishing device as defined in claim 11, the device including a storage unit having multiple separate compartments. 13. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein in use the body has a centre of gravity that is lower than the metacentre. 14. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of the preceding claims, the fishing device further comprising a line holder for slideably connecting a line with the device. 15. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 14, wherein the line holder comprises a pulley. 16. A remotely operable fishing device as defined in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the fishing tackle includes a line that extends to a shore end. 17. A remotely operable fishing device comprising: 

 a body configured in use for movement in water, and a guidance system housed in the body, wherein a target navigational bearing of the device is set on shore and the direction of the movement of the device through the water is guided by the measured bearings of the guidance system. 18. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 17, wherein the body further comprises a nose and the guidance system is housed in the nose. 19. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 18, wherein the body is formed from three parts including the nose, an intermediate portion and a tail. 20. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of claims 17 to 19, wherein the guidance system is in the form of an electronic compass. 21. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of claims 17 to 19, wherein the guidance system is in the form of a magnetometer, an accelerometer, a gyroscope, a GPS, or any combination thereof. 22. A remotely operable fishing device according to any of the preceding claims further comprising two motors to propel the device through the water. 23. A remotely operable fishing device according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the device is propelled by at least one jet unit. 24. A remotely operable fishing device according to claim 22 or 23, wherein the device is configured to use differential thrust to control the direction of the device in the water. 25. A remotely operable fishing device comprising: 

 a body configured in use for movement in water, the body having a propulsion system that is powered by a battery, wherein the battery is located in a position which determines the centre of gravity of the device.
